{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [], "credits_detailed": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45278", "cvss": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-601"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "### Impact

An attacker can craft links that would redirect users to another website, when the victim uses the attackers link to log in via user OIDC.

### Patches

<!-- Adjust component name and version. "Nextcloud Enterprise" is only needed for Server and shipped apps -->

It is recommended that the Nextcloud User OIDC app is upgraded to 8.2.2

### Workarounds

<!-- Remove not applicable sections -->

* No other workaround available

### References

<!-- Link to the main/master PR only -->

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3464925)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/user_oidc/pull/1273)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
